description:
SUMMER STARTS NOW | EXCLUSIVE DEAL BY BLACKLINE. With The Market Settling & Demand Returning, We're Moving Into Summer Early - Aligned Back To The Blackline Standard. Choose One Of The Following Exclusive Offers Redeemable On Any Of Our Stock Cars. 1. Complimentary PPF (Gloss or Satin) 2. Complimentary 1 Year Insurance Cover (T's & C's Apply) 3. AED 10,000 Auto Loan Down Payment Contribution For More Information Please Reach Out To One Of The Team Today 
 2025 Rolls Royce Spectre, 102kWh, AWD, 584bhp, 1 Speed Auto. AED 1,399,000 or AED 21,918 / Month with 20 % Down Payment over 5 Years. 
 - Mileage Only 1,180 KM's - 1 Year Blackline Warranty - Full Service History - European Specification - Price includes VAT 
 - Bespoke 23” Forged Aluminium Wheels - Ambient Air Package - Fast Charging Cable Professional - Parking Assistant Plus - Apple CarPlay - Wireless Charging Tray - BMW Live Cockpit Professional - Polished Stainless Package - Illuminated Treadplate Package - Rolls-Royce Bespoke Audio - Star Light Headlining
